title: Writing a Specific Aims Page — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Odero-Marah)
display_label: Writing a Specific Aims Page Slides (2024-03-07)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-03-07 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Writing a Specific Aims Page' presented by Valerie Odero-Marah, PhD (MSU Biology). Companion seminar to Kamangar's earlier 2023-02-13 Specific Aims session. References three external example sets (UAB CFAR, Arizona Emergency Medicine, Texas Tech Nursing) as supplementary models. No Zoom recording archived.
